tool_args.label: 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Recurring Agenda Items summary
tool_args.raw_text: Recurring Agenda Items: Approval of Minutes (Committee Chair & Members), Work Plan (Committee Chair & Members), President's Reports (President), MTA Police Report (MTA Police), Action Items, Information Items, Finance Reports (Management & Budget), Procurements (Procurement & Logistics)

payload.claim_text: Recurring Agenda Items include: Approval of Minutes, Work Plan, President's Report, Police Report, Action Items, Information Items, Finance Report, and Procurements. Each item has a designated responsibility and defined purpose.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee Recurring Agenda Items

tool_args.label: Key Performance Metrics Report description
tool_args.raw_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.subject: Key Performance Metrics Report

tool_args.label: Fall Track Work Programs scope
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.

payload.claim_text: Fall Track Work Programs include Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
payload.subject: Fall Track Work Programs

tool_args.label: Winter Track Work - Switch Installations
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.

payload.claim_text: Winter Track Work Programs include plans to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.
payload.subject: Winter Track Work Programs
